name: Chocolate Fruit and Nut Cake - Country Living Holidays
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of an 8-inch springform pan with waxed paper.
2. In a small bowl, combine orange juice and crumbled macaroons, stirring to blend and moisten crumbs.
3. In a medium-size bowl, combine almonds, prunes, and orange rind; set aside.
4. In the top of a double boiler over simmering water, melt chocolate, stirring frequently. Remove from heat and beat in butter until melted.
5. Beat in cream until well blended.
6. Spread macaroon mixture in the bottom of the prepared pan and top with half of the chocolate mixture.
7. Top with almond and prune mixture, then layer with remaining chocolate mixture. Cover and refrigerate 6 hours or overnight.
8. To serve, remove side of springform pan from cake. Invert cake onto a plate. Remove waxed paper and invert cake again, chocolate side up, onto serving plate. Sift cocoa over top.
